Inspect a Registered HBSAE Model Specification

Source: R/register-model.R
get_hbsae_model.Rd

Inspect a Registered HBSAE Model Specification

Usage

get_hbsae_model(key)

Arguments

key

Character. A model key returned by list_hbsae_models.

Value

The named list spec, or NULL if not found.

See also

register_hbsae_model

Examples

get_hbsae_model("lognormal")
#> $family
#> [1] "lognormal"
#> 
#> $link
#> [1] "identity"
#> 
#> $discrete
#> [1] FALSE
#> 
#> $supports_mi
#> [1] TRUE
#> 
#> $has_addition_term
#> [1] FALSE
#> 
#> $addition_template
#> NULL
#> 
#> $response_check
#> function (y) 
#> {
#>     v <- y[!is.na(y)]
#>     length(v) == 0L || all(v > 0)
#> }
#> <bytecode: 0x55c2e9571c60>
#> <environment: 0x55c2e9567438>
#> 
#> $response_check_msg
#> [1] "Lognormal response must be strictly positive (y > 0)."
#> 
#> $default_priors
#> function (...) 
#> NULL
#> <bytecode: 0x55c2e95766e0>
#> <environment: 0x55c2e9567438>
#>
